title: acaena hirsutula var. hirsutula
intro: Acaena hirsutula var. hirsutula is a flowering plant species in the family Rosaceae, commonly known as woolly cat's ear or hairy sheep's bur. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Acaena hirsutula var. hirsutula include the treatment of wounds, burns, and skin conditions such as eczema and acne, as well as its potential to lower cholesterol levels and prevent certain types of cancer. Acaena hirsutula var. hirsutula is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, tinctures, and salves, to promote wound healing and improve overall health.
